case_title: JOSELITO GARCIA BASCARA VS. STEVE WING CHUI

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BASCARA, JOSELITO GARCIA AS TO DEFENDANT CHUI, STEVE WING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BASCARA, JOSELITO GARCIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHUI, STEVE WING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CHUI, STEVE WING RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BASCARA, JOSELITO GARCIA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,675.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
